approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-016 — Add optional search and semantics
goal: Provide cross-project search, relationship suggestions, clustering, similar views, orphan detection and contradiction hints as optional services.

acceptance.assertion: Registry and declared artifacts are searchable with source citations.
Semantic service failure does not block core rendering or operation.
Suggestions expose confidence and never become source facts automatically.
Visibility boundaries constrain indexing and result delivery.
